PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q358424 p:P54 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P54 ?team ; pq:P580 ?startDate ; pq:P582 ?endDate .
  FILTER(?startDate <= "1980-12-31T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime && ?endDate >= "1980-01-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  .
  ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = "en")
}
